policy: Evaluation-only. Do not inject this report into target-agent prompt/runtime context.

style_gate.en: Fail means the script contains unsupported identity facts. Warnings mean the style still sounds like raw visual description.
style_gate.zh: fail 表示解说稿包含无依据身份事实；warning 表示文本仍偏向原始画面描述。

recommended_identity_distribution.condition_en: Use only when roster/OCR/broadcast graphic or prior verified fact supports it.
recommended_identity_distribution.condition_zh: 仅在名单、OCR、转播图表或已验证事实支持时使用。

recommended_identity_distribution.condition_en: Use when team and role/jersey number are visible but the name is not secure.
recommended_identity_distribution.condition_zh: 球队与角色/号码可见但姓名不稳时使用。

recommended_identity_distribution.condition_en: Use for flowing play when exact identity is not important.
recommended_identity_distribution.condition_zh: 普通推进或身份不关键时使用球队主语。

recommended_identity_distribution.condition_en: Use color only as evidence, contrast, or occasional rhetoric, not as the default subject.
recommended_identity_distribution.condition_zh: 颜色只作证据、对比或少量修辞，不能作为默认主语。
